content.en:
Ye Tian originally thought that this crack was also connected to the True Mountain Territory of the Xuanqi Realm, but when he stepped into this crack, he saw a special void.

"This is ......"

Ye Tian was shocked, this was obviously a special void created, surrounded by an incomparably powerful Infinite Extreme Dao power, any immeasurable Extreme Dao power was beyond his imagination.

Even if he tried his best, it would be difficult to shake the slightest bit here.

"It should be left by the mysterious being who sealed the Blood Ancestor!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Soon, he realized that he couldn't get out of here, and there was no way to get there.

However, his strength has not been suppressed, and there is no sealing power that exists.

Obviously, this is not to trap outsiders.

What was the purpose of the mysterious being in setting up such a place?

Ye Tian sat cross-legged and silently comprehended the mystery here.

As time passed, Ye Tian opened his eyes suddenly.

"I see!"

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

If he didn't guess wrong, after the mysterious existence sealed the blood, he left something here by the way, which can be regarded as a little feedback to the Silent Black Sea!

If the Silent Black Sea is someday born into a powerful immeasurable life form in the future, and the Raccoon Blood is about to be born, then the Silent Black Sea may be saved with the help of something here.

Of course, this is just Ye Tian's speculation.

"A heritage, I don't know what it is!"

Ye Tian continued to comprehend, and with his realm, he didn't realize anything at the beginning, until a long time later.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian seemed to comprehend.

In an instant, his immeasurable will touched some mechanism of this void.

Suddenly, an illusory figure emerged.

This figure is surrounded by an extremely terrifying Infinite Dao Domain, no, it should be called the Infinite Extreme Dao Domain, because this is the Dao Domain born from the combination of the Immeasurable Will and the Immeasurable Extreme Dao.

Immediately afterward, the Infinite Extreme Dao Domain combined with the life force of the Immeasurable Life Form, and gradually merged into One Finger.

"Broken!"

A finger goes, shatters everything, and runs through the world.

The power of this finger was terrifying to the extreme, enough to wipe out Ye Tian countless times.

"This is not the Infinite Extreme Dao Mastery Technique!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The Infinite Extreme Dao Mastery Technique is far from being so terrifying, it is definitely a more powerful move technique, an ability that he can't master at the moment.

I saw this mysterious being show this trick again and again in the form of a phantom, which is a kind of inheritance.

"The Infinite Extreme Dao Domain is so majestic and powerful, it can be turned into a finger of power to explode!"

Ye Tian was curious.

Immediately, he asked another Hurricane Collar who copied his body in the Genki Territory to inquire about this information, and finally obtained a little bit of information in the Remnant Heaven Pavilion.

"Infinite Extreme Domain Technique!"

This is a legendary-level power, and those high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the Hurricane Leader don't know, and they can't even learn this inheritance knowledge.

It is rumored that you only need to learn a little fur to beat the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the same level.

"I didn't expect that mysterious existence to leave an immeasurable Extreme Domain Technique inheritance here!" Ye Tian was secretly surprised.

That being obviously wanted him to comprehend the Immeasurable Extreme Domain Technique here before letting him leave.

And he is only a mid-level immeasurable lifeform, and it is undoubtedly a bit difficult to realize an immeasurable extreme domain technique, but it is not hopeless.

In terms of potential, foundation, strength, and comprehension, he was no different from a high-level immeasurable lifeform, or even more prominent, so he was very confident in himself.

Thereupon.

In the following years, Ye Tian began to try to comprehend this immeasurable extreme domain technique.

As for creating his own Infinite Extreme Domain Technique, he didn't have the ability to do so now.

At first, he was very ignorant of the Infinite Extreme Domain Technique, but as he continued to comprehend, he gradually gained some understanding.

Like that mysterious being, condensing all of his Infinite Extreme Dao Domain on a single finger, this has an extremely terrifying requirement for the strength of his body, if the body is not strong enough, if he dares to do so, his body will directly collapse.

And Ye Tian had already carried out eleven life reforges, and it was the most perfect way to reforge, so his body strength was stronger than that of ordinary high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

Therefore, he met the requirements for cultivating the Infinite Extreme Domain Technique, but it was still not possible to achieve the level of that mysterious being, he could at most accommodate a small part of the power of the Infinite Extreme Dao Domain.

So, Ye Tian started by accommodating a little bit of the power of the Infinite Extreme Dao Domain, and slowly tried to cultivate the Infinite Extreme Domain Technique.

However, he still failed again and again, and each failure caused a certain amount of damage to his body, and it took some time to recover.

If it was other high-level immeasurable life forms, they would definitely wait until the physical body recovered before cultivating, but Ye Tian didn't care about it, he didn't recover from his injuries, and directly continued to cultivate.

It's a big deal that after the body is destroyed, make another copy to save time.

If you recover from your injuries, it will take a long time to recover, which will be too late.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian's copy body to be scrapped, so he directly copied a new copy body and continued to practice the Infinite Extreme Domain Technique.

In this way, Ye Tian scrapped one copy body after another in order to cultivate the Infinite Extreme Domain Technique.

"The Infinite Extreme Domain Technique is really too difficult to cultivate, and that mysterious existence is too much to look up to the Silent Black Sea, that is, I, if I am another immeasurable life form, I am not qualified to practice at all, even if I am qualified to practice, I can't practice it!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course.

The mysterious being may have just done it casually and didn't think much about it.

Before you know it, the first year of the Million Realms has passed.

On this day, Ye Tian had finally preliminarily completed the cultivation of this Infinite Extreme Domain Technique, but he had only used one hundredths of the Infinite Extreme Realm Domain power.

Therefore, the power of this Infinite Extreme Domain Technique that he had initially cultivated was still very weak, and it was not weak in his other Infinite Extreme Dao Control Techniques.

But this represents a good start, as long as he continues to practice, this Infinite Extreme Domain Technique will become his most powerful attack method and hole card.

Subsequently, Ye Tian continued to cultivate, and his mastery of this Infinite Extreme Domain Technique became deeper and deeper, and his power became more and more powerful.

......

this day.

Ye Tian used this Infinite Extreme Domain Technique in this void, and the power of the Infinite Extreme Dao Domain was condensed in his fingers.

"Broken!"

Ye Tian pointed and directly broke through this void and connected to the outside world.

"I actually broke through this void, it seems that I have met the standard of that mysterious being!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Airplanes!

I saw his body move, leaving this void and returning to the severed black mountain.

"Although this Infinite Extreme Domain Technique comes from the inheritance of that mysterious existence, every Great Ancestor will have its own mark in cultivation, and there are still some differences, so let's take a new name. What's it called?"

Ye Tian pondered for a moment, and then took a name - amputated finger!
